title: hondbesseion olens var. normale
intro: Hondbesseion olens var. normale, also known as the "Common Yarrow", is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. Its medicinal properties make it beneficial for wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, while also providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Common herbal preparations include tea, tincture, and infused oil, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including colds, flu, and skin irritations.
